title: rubus × malacus
intro: Rubus × malacus, also known as the raspberry-blackberry hybrid, is a cross between the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are known to combat free radicals and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Rubus × malacus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
